text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while strolling around the school
grounds at lunch...

text_block_list.name: Hasty Student
text_block_list.text:
I'm staaarviiing! I have to hurry up and get
something to ea—agh?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A student hurrying down the stairs suddenly takes
a spectacular tumble! This could be bad!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But in the blink of an eye, Yaeno Muteki sweeps
in like a gust of wind, catches the falling student
in midair, and lands as lightly as a leaf.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Your safety is paramount. Mind your step in the
future.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
This, too, I owe entirely to your guidance,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I doubt the old me could have caught her gently
enough to ensure we both escaped injury.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Similarly, it was largely thanks to my daily
training that I was able to act without hesitation.
Those sessions have sharpened my mind.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Thus, you have my heartfelt gratitude for your
guidance! Osu!
choice_data_list: Well, no need to go overboard...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
But I really didn't expect to improve so much in
this short period. Techniques that were once
impossible might now be within reach...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Care to join me for a little sparring? You can be
the recipient of my purest strike, a technique
unleashed through a powerful body and supple,
spring-like reflexes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad that Yaeno Muteki can tell she's making
progress. That matters more than anything.
